title: Stockton, CA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Stockton, CA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Stockton is a city in CA with a population of 320,804. Central Valley port city with waterfront revival, cheaper than Bay Area but still California prices.
